mapper.select: SELECT EP.PROM_ID, EP.PROM_TITLE, EP.PROM_DETAIL, EP.CREATE_DATE, EP.UPDATE_DATE, EP.VIEWS, I.CHANGE_NAME AS POSTER_PATH, EA.WEBSITE AS PROMOTION_PAGE_URL, AS2.STAT_CODE AS IS_PROMOTED, EA.APP_ID, U.NICKNAME AS PROMO_WRITER, E.START_DATE AS START_DATE, E.END_DATE AS END_DATE FROM EVENT_PROMOTION EP JOIN EVENT E ON EP.EVENT_ID = E.EVENT_ID LEFT JOIN EVENT_APPLICATION EA ON E.APP_ID = EA.APP_ID LEFT JOIN APP_STATUS AS2 ON EA.STAT_CODE = AS2.STAT_CODE LEFT JOIN PROM_IMAGE PMI ON EP.PROM_ID = PMI.PROM_ID LEFT JOIN IMAGE I ON PMI.IMG_NO = I.IMG_NO LEFT JOIN "USER" U ON EA.USER_NO = U.USER_NO ORDER BY EP.PROM_ID DESC OFFSET #{pi.offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pi.limit} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM EVENT_PROMOTION EP
WHERE EP.PROM_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'

SELECT EP.PROM_ID, EP.PROM_TITLE, EP.PROM_DETAIL, EP.CREATE_DATE, EP.UPDATE_DATE, EP.VIEWS, I.CHANGE_NAME AS POSTER_PATH, EA.WEBSITE AS PROMOTION_PAGE_URL, AS2.STAT_CODE AS IS_PROMOTED, EA.APP_ID, U.NICKNAME AS PROMO_WRITER, E.START_DATE AS START_DATE, E.END_DATE AS END_DATE FROM EVENT_PROMOTION EP JOIN EVENT E ON EP.EVENT_ID = E.EVENT_ID LEFT JOIN EVENT_APPLICATION EA ON E.APP_ID = EA.APP_ID LEFT JOIN APP_STATUS AS2 ON EA.STAT_CODE = AS2.STAT_CODE LEFT JOIN PROM_IMAGE PMI ON EP.PROM_ID = PMI.PROM_ID LEFT JOIN IMAGE I ON PMI.IMG_NO = I.IMG_NO LEFT JOIN "USER" U ON EA.USER_NO = U.USER_NO
WHERE EP.PROM_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{searchKeyword} || '%'
ORDER BY EP.PROM_ID DESC OFFSET #{pi.offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pi.limit} ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_PROM_ID.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO EVENT_PROMOTION ( PROM_ID, EVENT_ID, PROM_TITLE, PROM_DETAIL, CREATE_DATE, VIEWS ) VALUES ( #{promoId}, #{eventId}, #{promoTitle}, #{promoDetail}, SYSDATE, 0 )

SELECT SEQ_EVENT_IMG_NO.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO IMAGE ( IMG_NO, IMG_TYPE, ORIGIN_NAME, CHANGE_NAME, CREATE_DATE ) VALUES ( #{imgNo}, 'P', #{originalFilename}, #{posterPath}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT EP.PROM_ID, EP.PROM_TITLE, EP.PROM_DETAIL, EP.CREATE_DATE, EP.UPDATE_DATE, EP.VIEWS, I.CHANGE_NAME AS POSTER_PATH, I.ORIGIN_NAME AS ORIGINAL_FILENAME, I.IMG_NO, PMI.PROM_IMG_NO, EA.WEBSITE AS PROMOTION_PAGE_URL, AS2.STAT_CODE AS IS_PROMOTED, EA.APP_ID, U.NICKNAME AS PROMO_WRITER, E.START_DATE AS START_DATE, E.END_DATE AS END_DATE FROM EVENT_PROMOTION EP JOIN EVENT E ON EP.EVENT_ID = E.EVENT_ID LEFT JOIN EVENT_APPLICATION EA ON E.APP_ID = EA.APP_ID LEFT JOIN APP_STATUS AS2 ON EA.STAT_CODE = AS2.STAT_CODE LEFT JOIN PROM_IMAGE PMI ON EP.PROM_ID = PMI.PROM_ID LEFT JOIN IMAGE I ON PMI.IMG_NO = I.IMG_NO LEFT JOIN "USER" U ON EA.USER_NO = U.USER_NO WHERE EP.PROM_ID = #{promoId}
mapper.update: UPDATE EVENT_PROMOTION SET PROM_TITLE = #{promoTitle}, PROM_DETAIL = #{promoDetail}, UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE PROM_ID = #{promoId}
UPDATE IMAGE SET ORIGIN_NAME = #{originalFilename}, CHANGE_NAME = #{posterPath}, CREATE_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE IMG_NO = #{imgNo}
mapper.select: SELECT E.EVENT_ID, EA.APP_ID FROM EVENT E JOIN EVENT_APPLICATION EA ON E.APP_ID = EA.APP_ID WHERE E.EVENT_TITLE = #{eventTitle} AND ROWNUM = 1
